# OpenClaw: Adam + Rusty

URL: https://adamontherun.github.io/openclaw-experiment/
Repository: https://github.com/adamontherun/openclaw-experiment
Type: Reveal.js presentation

Summary:
OpenClaw: Adam + Rusty is a web presentation about using one AI agent to automate personal life workflows and run a volleyball micro-SaaS. The deck covers daily briefs, email triage, jokes, sports logistics, social engagement, content generation, and business reporting.

Key topics:
- AI agents
- automation
- personal workflow tooling
- micro-SaaS operations
- content generation
- social media automation
- Reveal.js presentations

Primary sections:
- Title and framing
- Personal life automations
- Rusty showcase screenshots
- Daily brief and iMessage joke workflows
- Sports logistics and personal crons
- VolleyIntel micro-SaaS
- Gmail triage and approvals
- Social engagement engine
- Content generation pipeline
- Daily business brief
- Lessons learned and alternatives

Preview image:
https://adamontherun.github.io/openclaw-experiment/images/ig-cross-training-post.png
